quest.05A6946A5AF26684.quest_desc.original:
If you're looking for wireless redstone, &6Create&r has a simple &aRedstone Link&r that can connect up to any other link for wireless redstone. Using a &aCreate Wrench&r, you can toggle which link will transmit the redstone signal.

&6RFTools&r has something similar, but in two separate blocks.
quest.05A6946A5AF26684.quest_desc.translation:
若你正在尋找無線紅石方案，《&6動力機械&r》提供了一個簡單的&a無線紅石訊號終端&r，與其他終端連接之後，可以無線傳遞紅石訊號。

使用&a動力機械扳手&r對著終端點擊右鍵，可以將終端設定為接收端。

&6RFTools&r 也有類似的東西，但分為兩個獨立的方塊。

quest.09DE55D4265E6E9D.quest_desc.original:
Tired of ugly cables dangling around your base?

&eCable Facades&r (the mod) provides a one-size-fits-all solution to hiding all of your cables.
{@pagebreak}
To set up an empty &bFacade&r, place it in a crafting grid with the block you wish to change it to. This will "consume" the block, but this process can be reverted by placing the &bFacade&r back in a crafting grid and extracting the block.

Once set up, simply place the &bFacade&r over your ugly cables and voilà, your cables are gone!

The &aFacade Wrench&r can be used to toggle facade transparency by Sneak + Right-clicking it.
quest.09DE55D4265E6E9D.quest_desc.translation:
厭倦了基地周遭懸掛的醜陋線纜嗎？

《&e線纜偽裝板&r》模組為隱藏所有線纜，提供了一個萬精油的解決方案。
{@pagebreak}
若要設定一個空的&b偽裝板&r，請將其放入合成欄，並放入你希望將其變成的方塊。

這將「消耗」該方塊，但此過程可以透過將&b偽裝板&r放回合成欄，並從其中取出方塊來還原。

設定完成後，只需將&b偽裝板&r放置在醜陋的線纜上，快看，線纜就這麼消失了！

使用&a偽裝板扳手&r對著空氣「點擊右鍵」，可切換偽裝板在世界上顯示的透明度。

quest.0AFF8E28FC51B123.quest_desc.original:
Need to swap two simple blocks with as little hassle as possible? Try the &cSwapper Wand&r!

Need to grab a block and place it somewhere else with as little hassle as possible? Try the Picker Wand!
quest.0AFF8E28FC51B123.quest_desc.translation:
想要盡可能輕鬆地，將兩個簡單的方塊對調位置嗎？試試&c交換法杖&r吧！

想要盡可能輕鬆地，將一個方塊搬起，並放置在其他地方嗎？試試搬運法杖&r吧！

quest.215E7EB95A7C64A3.quest_desc.original:
Every second matters, and that's why you should shove them in the &6Temporal Pouch&r.

This pouch stores time, as long as it is in your inventory. This time can be used to increase the ticks of pretty much anything by sneak-using the pouch on it.

If something is too slow, use some of your stored time to make it faster!

&7&oWho says you can't buy time?
quest.215E7EB95A7C64A3.quest_desc.translation:
每分每秒都至關重要，這就是為什麼你應該把它們塞進&6時間錦囊&r裡。

只要這個錦囊在你的物品欄中，它就會儲存時間。

這些時間可以透過使用錦囊，對任何機器「潛行+點擊右鍵」
來增加其刻速率。

若某些機器跑得太慢，就使用你儲存的一些時間來讓它變得更快！

&7&o誰說時間是買不到的？

quest.2682A911828C2D88.quest_desc.original:
&eFramed Blocks&r allow you to create custom blocks and shapes that uses the texture of almost any other block in the pack!

To do this, place down a framed block, and then use the block with the desired texture on the framed block to copy the texture over.

There are also some cool features for these blocks, like using &6Glowstone Dust&r on a framed block to make it glow!
quest.2682A911828C2D88.quest_desc.translation:
&e鑲框方塊&r能讓你創造並自訂方塊及形狀，並使用模組包中幾乎所有的方塊的紋理！

若要使用這些功能，請放置一個鑲框方塊，然後對著該鑲框方塊，使用具有所需紋理的方塊來複製紋理。

這些方塊還有一些很酷的功能，例如在鑲框方塊上使用&6螢石粉&r使其擁有照明效果！

quest.26F18323EB6EFCA0.quest_desc.original: &bSNAD&r blocks allow you to create farms of Cactus or Sugarcane easily. These can also be given a redstone signal to increase the growth rate of the crop.
quest.26F18323EB6EFCA0.quest_desc.translation:
&b子沙&r方塊讓你能輕鬆建立仙人掌或甘蔗農場。

還可以透過給予紅石連閃，提高作物的生長速度。

quest.2BB6C51E445A1C95.quest_desc.original:
&6Entangled&r allows you to bind two blocks together, allowing you to interact with them as if they were the same block!

This allows you to transfer items, energy, fluids, and more instantly.

&cImportant&r: It will be worth using this on the &6World Engine&r to give you more sides to interface with!
quest.2BB6C51E445A1C95.quest_desc.translation:
&6纏結方塊&r會將兩個方塊綁定在一起，讓你能夠對該兩個方塊進行完全一樣的互動！

你可以使用它立即傳輸物品、能量、流體或其他東西。

&c重要事項&r：對&6世界引擎&r使用此方塊會讓你能夠對它進行更多的互動！

quest.2C1649AE3DADD71D.quest_desc.original:
&eConstruction Sticks&r is a mod all about making the building process much faster.

While holding a &eConstruction Stick&r in your hand, you can extend blocks in any direction with just one click!

There are also some cool upgrades that you can add to the &eSticks&r, like making it use power instead of durability.
quest.2C1649AE3DADD71D.quest_desc.translation:
&e建築棒&r是一款致力於讓建築過程變得更快捷的模組。

手持&e建築棒&r時，只需右鍵一下，即可向任何方向延伸方塊！

你還可以為這些&e建築棒&r安裝一些酷炫的升級，例如改裝成消耗能量，而不是耐久度。

quest.2C8099E185CA2B60.quest_desc.original:
The &aCoffee Maker&r is used to make a potion-like drink that provides several buffs when consumed.

This machine requires power to work, and mixes water and &aCoffee Beans&r into an &aEmpty Cup&r to make a &aCoffee Cup&r.

You can add up to 8 items within the GUI to provide special buffs.
{@pagebreak}
Note: The small numbers on the GUI represent the order in which the items will be consumed, so make sure you have the correct order of buffs.


You can brew the following buffs:

Pufferfish: Provides &9Water Breathing&r (up to 2).

Magma Cream: Provides &6Fire Resistance&r (up to 2).

Golden Carrot: Provides &eNight Vision&r (up to 2).
{@pagebreak}
Fermented Spider Eye: Provides &7Invisibility&r (up to 2).

Ghast Tear: Provides &cRegeneration&r (up to 3).

Blaze Powder: Provides &dStrength&r (up to 4).

Sugar: Provides &bSpeed&r (up to 4).

Milk Bottle/Bucket: Adds 1min to a buff, but reduce its level by 1.
quest.2C8099E185CA2B60.quest_desc.translation:
&a咖啡機&r用於調配類似藥水的飲料，飲用後可提供多種增益效果。

這台機器需要能量才能運作，並將水與&a咖啡豆&r混合到&a空杯&r中，製成&a杯裝咖啡&r。

你可以在介面中，加入最多 8 個物品以提供特殊的增益效果。
{@pagebreak}
注意：介面上的小數字代表物品被消耗的順序，因此請確保增益效果的順序正確。


你可以用來調配以下增益效果：

河豚：提供&9水下呼吸&r（最高 2 級）。

岩漿球：提供&6抗火&r（最高 2 級）。

金胡蘿蔔：提供&e夜視&r（最高 2 級）。
{@pagebreak}
發酵蜘蛛眼：提供&7隱形&r（最高 2 級）。

幽靈眼淚：提供&c回復&r（最高 3 級）。

烈焰粉：提供&d力量&r（最高 4 級）。

糖：提供&b速度&r（最高 4 級）。

牛奶瓶／桶：使增益時間延長 1 分鐘，但會使效果降低 1 級。

quest.2EEE782146096F9C.quest_desc.original: Probably one of the best mods out there for builders, the &eBuilding Gadgets&r mod adds several new gadgets that are a must have to make building better!
quest.2EEE782146096F9C.quest_desc.translation: 大概是建築師們最喜歡的模組之一，&e建築小幫手&r模組新增了幾種新的工具，是改善建築體驗的必備之選！

quest.4126A470077923D2.quest_desc.original:
The &aCardboard Box&r is a super useful item that can be used to move block entities like chests, spawners, and more!

Using a box on a block will cover it, allowing you to break and pick it up as an item. Placing this item down and then sneak-right clicking on it will remove the box.
quest.4126A470077923D2.quest_desc.translation:
&a紙箱&r是一個超級實用的物品，可用於移動方塊實體，如儲物箱、生怪磚等等！

對一個方塊使用紙箱會將其包裝起來，讓你能夠將其挖掘並拾起。

將裝有方塊的紙箱重新放回世界，

並對其「潛行 + 點擊右鍵」即可拆除紙箱。

quest.45CB3F325010A5AD.quest_desc.original:
Need a place to store all of your experience so you don't lose it when you die?

The &aExperience Holder&r from &6Just Dire Things&r is easy to use, and can also be used to collect experience around it in a configurable range.

The &aExperience Obelisk&r from &6Cognition&r works the same way!

&7Even if you think you aren't going to die when going to the Arcane Grove, you probably should be safe and store your experience anyway.&r
quest.45CB3F325010A5AD.quest_desc.translation:
需要一個地方來儲存你所有的經驗，以免在死亡時丟失嗎？

來自《&6Just Dire Things&r》的&a經驗儲存器&r非常易於使用，
還可用於在指定範圍內收集周圍的經驗球。

來自《&6認知&r》的&a經驗方尖碑&r也有相同的功能！

&7即使你認為去秘法源林時不會發生意外，&r

&7但為了保險起見，還是建議你把經驗儲存起來。&r

quest.48C1A1BB346B7D07.quest_desc.original:
Using &6Time Crystals&r, you can make the &6Time Wand&r.

This uses &6Time Fluid&r to speed up any block it's used on, similar to the Time in a Bottle or Temporal Pouch.
quest.48C1A1BB346B7D07.quest_desc.translation:
使用&6時間水晶&r，你可以製作&6時間法杖&r。

這支法杖使用&6時間流體&r來為你的機器加速，類似於時間瓶或時間錦囊。

quest.4B6154D6F9B7C7BF.quest_desc.original:
&aCrafting Stations&r can pick up items stored in adjacent inventories and will also hold items in their crafting grids.

They function like their &eTinker's Construct&r version, for those who remember that.
quest.4B6154D6F9B7C7BF.quest_desc.translation:
&a工作站&r可以取用儲存在相鄰容器中的物品，並且也會將物品保留在其合成欄中。

對於那些還記得的人來說，它的功能與&e匠魂&r版本類似。

quest.51804232265672A9.quest_desc.original:
The &aTrash Slot&r mod allows you to open a slot in any inventory to delete unwanted items.

["The slot in the inventory can be toggled with the keybind ", { "keybind": "key.trashslot.toggle", "color": "green" }, "."]

["You can also quickly delete items once the slot is open by using the keybind ", { "keybind": "key.trashslot.delete", "color": "green" }, "."]

There is also the &aTrash Bin&r icon in the top left of your inventory that you can use as well. This can also be accessed by using the &a/trashcan&r command.
quest.51804232265672A9.quest_desc.translation:
&a《垃圾桶欄位》&r模組在物品欄新增了一個能夠讓你刪除任何不需要物品的欄位。

["你可以透過按下「", { "keybind": "key.trashslot.toggle", "color": "green" }, "」開關此欄位。"]

["你也可以在該欄位開啟時按下「", { "keybind": "key.trashslot.delete", "color": "green" }, "」鍵快速刪除物品。"]

在物品欄的左上角也有一個&a垃圾桶&r圖示，它具有相同的功能。使用「&a/trashcan&r」指令也能開啟這個垃圾桶。

quest.59A6D7B544F1AE06.quest_desc.original:
Want an easy way to travel to different levels of your base? Make an &dElevator&r!

These can also copy the texture of another block by using that block directly on the &dElevator&r.
quest.59A6D7B544F1AE06.quest_desc.translation:
想要一種輕鬆穿梭基地不同樓層的方式嗎？製作一個&d電梯&r吧！

它們還可以透過直接在&d電梯&r上使用另一個方塊來複製該方塊的紋理。

quest.5BBA51F8FE4D6C3B.quest_desc.original:
A solid block that you can choose whether you want to walk through it or not! Right-click it to toggle its current state

While mobs don't know how to walk through this in its non-solid state, they can still be pushed or fall through.
quest.5BBA51F8FE4D6C3B.quest_desc.translation:
這是一種固體方塊，你可以選擇是否能穿越它！對其點擊右鍵來切換其目前狀態。

雖然生物不知道如何在非固體狀態下穿越它，但它們仍然可以被推過或掉下去。

quest.6323068C93CF7DCE.quest_desc.original: The &dWand of Symmetry&r can set up layouts that will automatically place blocks mirroring the blocks you place.
quest.6323068C93CF7DCE.quest_desc.translation: &d對稱之杖&r可以設定佈局，自動鏡像放置你所放置的方塊。

quest.6FB2393F2348D59E.quest_desc.original:
The &aMob Imprisonment Tool&r is a simple reusable device that snatches up mobs so you can place them down anywhere you want.

The &aCreature Catcher&r works the same way, but requires you to throw the item at the mob... like a certain other game that shall not be named.
quest.6FB2393F2348D59E.quest_desc.translation:
&a生物捕捉工具&r是一種簡單且可重複使用的工具，可以捕捉生物，讓你能夠將它們放置在任何你想要的地方。

&a生物捕捉儀&r的運作方式大致相同，但需要你右鍵使用物品，將其扔向生物......就像某款不能提及名字的遊戲一樣。

quest.7804E97C7772403E.quest_desc.original:
Want a portable crafting table? Make a &aCrafting Table on a Stick&r!

You can put this in a &bCurio Slot&r that you can even set a keybind for quick access.
quest.7804E97C7772403E.quest_desc.translation:
想要隨時隨地合成嗎？製作一個&a攜帶式工作台&r吧！

你可以將它放入&b飾品欄&r中，甚至可以為其設定快捷鍵以進行快速使用。

quest.7A06D08AC7C65D20.quest_desc.original:
Have some enchants you want, but they are stuck to items you don't want to use?

You can easily separate enchants using the &bAnvil&r method.

First, place down a block of &dDraconium&r, then throw down an item with enchants on it. For every enchant you want to remove, you'll need to throw down an empty book as well.

To separate them, drop an &bAnvil&r onto the pile of items!
quest.7A06D08AC7C65D20.quest_desc.translation:
有一些你想要的附魔，但它們黏在你不想使用的物品上嗎？

你可以使用&b鐵砧&r來輕鬆分離附魔。

首先，放置一個&d龍金屬&r方塊，然後扔下一件帶有附魔的物品。根據你想要分離的每個附魔，你也需要扔下相應數量的書。

要將附魔分離，請將一個&b鐵砧&r掉落到這堆物品上！

quest.7A8D31482AB1FCAA.quest_desc.original:
&6Compact Machines&r allow you to create your own room in a pocket dimension!

This can be great for building farms that might cause FPS drops.

&eNote&r: These are &zShop Only&r items!
quest.7A8D31482AB1FCAA.quest_desc.translation:
&6壓縮空間機械&r讓你能建立屬於你自己的口袋維度房間！

這對於建造可能導致 FPS 下降的農場來說非常棒。

&e注意&r：這些物品只有&z商店&r有在賣哦！

quest.7B20023BE78887DA.quest_desc.original:
Other mods may add their own types, but &eSimple Magnets&r keeps it...simple. Just craft a &aMagnet&r, activate it with right click, and while it's on your person any items in range will be swiftly pulled to your person to get picked up!

The &dAdvanced Magnet&r has a larger range and a filter menu opened by sneak + right clicking.

Don't want your magnet to pull items in a particular area? Check out the &2Demagnetization Coils&r!

Any items in their range will ignore &aSimple Magnets&r pulling on them.
quest.7B20023BE78887DA.quest_desc.translation:
其他模組可能會增加自己的類型，但《&e簡易磁鐵&r》模組維持了......簡單風格。

製作一個&a磁鐵&r，點擊右鍵將其啟用，只要帶著磁鐵，範圍內的任何物品都會迅速被吸引到你身邊以便拾起！

&d進階磁鐵&r具有更大的吸引範圍，並且可以透過「潛行 + 點擊右鍵」開啟篩選選單。

不想讓你的磁鐵在特定區域吸引物品嗎？看看&2消磁線圈&r吧！

其運作範圍內的任何物品都會無視&a簡易磁鐵&r的吸引力。

quest.7C0FD2B2589BC66D.quest_desc.original:
Build a 3x3x3 of &bFurnaces&r to create the &bJumbo Furnace&r.

The &bJumbo Furnace&r allows multiple recipes to be processed at the same time, and it can be upgraded with more &bJumbo Furnaces&r in the bottom-right slot (up to 64), each one representing the number of items it can smelt at once.
quest.7C0FD2B2589BC66D.quest_desc.translation:
建造一座 3x3x3 的&b熔爐&r，即可組成&b巨無霸熔爐&r。

&b巨無霸熔爐&r能同時處理多個配方，並且能在右下角的欄位中，

使用更多&b巨無霸熔爐&r進行升級（最多 64 個），

每放入 1 個，一次可熔煉的物品數量也會增加 1 個。

quest.7F4E7C687E7D8707.quest_desc.original:
There are several ways to keep items from piling up on the ground from your farms!

Each of these are configurable, allowing you to set the range for item collection.
quest.7F4E7C687E7D8707.quest_desc.translation:
有很多能夠自動將你農場的掉落物直接吸起來的方式！

每一種都能夠進行設定，設定它們能夠吸起物品的範圍。
